properties.titulo_evento: Multibillion-dollar contract secures ‘major step forward’ for GCAP fighter jet
properties.descricao: Japan, Italy and the U.K. have handed a £4.6 billion ($6.1 billion) development contract to their national champions building the GCAP jet.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland teams up with Spain to double tanker aircraft purchase
properties.descricao: The agreement with Madrid will allow Warsaw to increase its tanker order to four units.

properties.titulo_evento: Taiwan needs a ‘hornet’s nest’ of drones to deter conflict, US diplomat says
properties.descricao: Taiwan says it needs to bolster its defenses in the face of a stepped-up threat from China, which claims the island as its own territory.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump offers to help end Russia-Ukraine war in Putin call, Kremlin says
properties.descricao: Kremlin aide Yury Ushakov says Trump made the offer during a nearly 90-minute phone call with the Russian president.

properties.titulo_evento: This immigrant served in the US military. Now he faces deportation
properties.descricao: Benito Miranda Hernandez completed three tours during the Iraq war but now faces removal from the US to Mexico.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Millions mourn Khamenei; Trump hints at Netanyahu meeting
properties.descricao: Late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and members of his family were killed in a US-Israeli air strike on February 28.

properties.titulo_evento: Ticket prices plunge for USA-Belgium World Cup last-16 match
properties.descricao: The price for the final 2026 World ⁠Cup match in Seattle hit nearly $4,000 but dipped as low as $1,549 ⁠on Tuesday.

properties.titulo_evento: Ounahi fires Morocco into World Cup quarterfinals with 3-0 win over Canada
properties.descricao: Azzedine Ounahi scored two of three second-half goals as Morocco ended cohosts run to reach last eight.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
properties.descricao: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".

properties.titulo_evento: Moment of destiny for France's Le Pen in verdict to decide her future in presidential race
properties.descricao: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen is appealing against a verdict which found her guilty of misusing EU funds.

properties.titulo_evento: Keiko Fujimori declared winner of Peru's presidential election weeks after vote
properties.descricao: The daughter of disgraced president Alberto Fujimori is declared winner of tight race nearly a month after voting took place.

properties.titulo_evento: Anguished families left to identify Venezuela quake victims at makeshift morgue
properties.descricao: The disaster has overwhelmed local services, with bodies put outside or in tents for identification.

properties.titulo_evento: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
properties.descricao: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump warns of communist threat as Washington parade cancelled due to heatwave
properties.descricao: "Communism is a mortal threat to American liberty," Trump said during a speech on Friday. "It is the greatest threat to our country".

properties.titulo_evento: Conservative candidate Keiko Fujimori wins Peru's presidential election in runoff
properties.descricao: Voters were primarily concerned with increasing levels of crime, especially extortion by violent organized crime gangs, and Fujimori pledged to combat crime with an iron fist.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran FM confirms reports Israel planned to target Tehran's negotiators
properties.descricao: Iran's foreign minister corroborated US media reports that Washington warned Tehran Israel may have had its chief negotiators on a target list during April talks in Islamabad, the same talks that produced the framework deal signed on 17 June.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela's interim leader defends earthquake response as death toll tops 2,500
properties.descricao: Delcy Rodríguez has hit back at criticism over her government’s response to the quakes, rejecting accusations of slow rescue efforts and claims that official casualty figures have been under-reported.

properties.titulo_evento: Marine Le Pen appeal verdict: Will the far-right leader be barred from the French presidency?
properties.descricao: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen’s political fate will be decided on Tuesday when a Paris appeals court rules on whether she is eligible to run in the 2027 presidential elections, a verdict with major implications for France's future. Le Pen is appeal...

properties.titulo_evento: Vingegaard takes yellow jersey as Tour de France begins in Barcelona
properties.descricao: Jonas Vingegaard took an early lead in his quest for a third Tour de France title ​as the Visma-Lease a Bike rider recorded the fastest time in stage one – a 19.6-km team time trial in Barcelona on Saturday. Last year's runner-up Vingegaard, who won...

properties.titulo_evento: Live: Putin and Zelensky speak to Trump ahead of NATO summit in Turkey
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump spoke with Russia's Vladimir Putin and Ukraine's Volodymyr Zelensky late Saturday to discuss the conflict in Ukraine ahead of a NATO summit in Ankara on July 7 and 8. Negotiations remain at an impasse, with Moscow demanding...

properties.titulo_evento: Trump again blasts 'communists', hails US as history's 'crowning achievement' on 250th anniversary
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump on Saturday hailed America as the "crowning achievement of human history" in a Fourth of July speech celebrating 250 years of US independence in Washington. Trump claimed that under his presidency, the United States was "pr...

properties.titulo_evento: Hezbollah, Hamas and Houthi officials attend funeral ceremonies for Iran's Khamenei
properties.descricao: Tens of thousands of mourners flocked to Tehran's Grand Mosalla Mosque to pay their respects to late supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on Saturday. Among them were representatives from Hamas, Hezbollah and the Houthis of Yemen, members of the "a...

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela quake death toll rises to nearly 3,000 as tens of thousands still reported missing
properties.descricao: Fatalities from Venezuela's devastating twin earthquakes jumped to nearly 3,000 people, official updated figures showed on Saturday, as international rescue teams began winding down search operations for survivors. Tens of thousands more are still r...

properties.titulo_evento: Tens of thousands rally in France for a comprehensive law to fight sexual violence
properties.descricao: The shockwave following the rape and murder of 11-year-old Lyhanna in May has continued to echo across France, with tens of thousands of people across the country marching on Saturday in support of what organisers call a comprehensive law against se...

properties.titulo_evento: Trump set to put NATO unity to the test at Turkey summit
properties.descricao: NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte is working to keep the alliance united and Donald Trump engaged. But disputes over burden sharing, US military commitments, and the Iran war are creating a major test for NATO unity.

properties.titulo_evento: Jehovah's Witnesses fight German state for Holocaust archive
properties.descricao: The Jehovah's Witnesses have secured a partial victory in a dispute over a unique archive documenting the community's persecution by the Nazi regime. It comes after a new memorial to the victims was unveiled in Berlin.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquake death toll nears 3,000 as hope to find survivors dims
properties.descricao: International rescue teams have begun closing up operations as deaths in Venezuela double quakes approach 3,000. Families are still looking for signs of their missing loved ones.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine strikes oil terminals near St. Petersburg in Russia
properties.descricao: The long-range strikes are the latest salvo in Ukraine’s expanding campaign to inflict economic damage on Russia and hinder its war machine.

properties.titulo_evento: Kielce pogrom in Poland: 80th anniversary of 1946 massacre
properties.descricao: Just over a year after World War II ended, a mob in the Polish city of Kielce killed around 40 Jews, some of them Holocaust survivors. A lie about ritual child murder escalated the violence.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: Khamenei's funeral ceremonies officially begin
properties.descricao: Huge crowds have gathered in Tehran to pay their final respects to Iran's supreme leader, who was killed in an airstrike at the start of the US-Israeli campaign against Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Far-right AfD threatens eastern Germany's energy transition
properties.descricao: Germany's far-right AfD wants to revive coal and nuclear power and curb non-EU immigration. Businesses in eastern Germany warn that its policies could harm the economy.

properties.titulo_evento: France’s far right didn’t drop its grudge against Les Bleus. It recast it.
properties.descricao: What was once an attack on immigration and identity has become an attack on privilege and elitism — a shift that mirrors the party’s path toward the presidency.

properties.titulo_evento: Bonus episode: Ernstfall — What if Russia attacks NATO?
properties.descricao: Today, we’re bringing you a special bonus episode from our colleagues at WELT. Originally released in German, Ernstfall is now available in English. What if Russia attacked NATO? How would Germany respond? And where are our weaknesses? We wanted answ...
